brand.promise: Committed to providing excellent service and quality results.

hero.headline: From sketch to living landscape.
hero.subheadline: Design-led outdoor contracting that moves from concept clarity to beautiful, buildable outcomes—delivered with care, safety, and schedule discipline.

about.title: Eastern Modern Specialists Artists Company (EMESSA)
about.lead: Headquartered in Jeddah, EMESSA is a Saudi landscape & construction company growing as part of Emessa International Group. We design and build sustainable outdoor environments—beneficial for people and the environment—by reading each site’s history, current state, and context.

clarity.p: We translate ideas into clear plans, materials, and execution details—reducing surprises and rework.

delivery.p: We plan and coordinate with a contractor mindset—prioritizing handover quality and predictable timelines.

quality.p: From hardscape to planting and outdoor details, we execute with clean edges, strong durability, and care.

services.title: Outdoor services, end-to-end
services.lead: A flexible service mix designed around outdoor environments—planning, building, and finishing to a premium standard.

constructionManagement.p: Planning, coordination, and execution control to keep scope, quality, and timelines predictable.

landscapeDesign.p: Site-aware designs that balance beauty, usability, and maintainability—optimized for the local environment.

specialProjects.p: Custom outdoor elements and bespoke scopes—from feature builds to unique installations.

irrigation.p: Irrigation planning and implementation that supports healthy greenery with efficient water use.

outdoorFurniture.p: Durable outdoor pieces and planters designed for weather, wear, and visual cohesion.

fencesGates.p: Functional perimeter solutions with clean detailing—privacy, security, and visual rhythm.

timeline.title: Sketch → Living Landscape
timeline.sub: A process designed for readability, quality, and calm execution—each step draws itself as you scroll.

sketch.p: Define intent, constraints, and the experience you want outdoors.

plan.p: Align design, materials, and scope into a build-ready plan.

build.p: Execute with consistent site standards, supervision, and quality checks.

care.p: Finalize details, ensure performance, and support long-term maintenance.

scope.title: Scope of work (in motion)
scope.sub: A snapshot of real delivery—from irrigation and planting to hardscape details. This ribbon scrolls continuously to bring the page to life.

profile.title: Profile & portfolio
profile.lead: Download our company profile (PDF) to review services, ISO certifications, organization chart, and selected major projects.

download.title: Company Profile (PDF)
download.p: A detailed overview of EMESSA—services, standards, organizational structure, and project portfolio.

highlights.title: Highlights
highlights.p: What you can expect when working with EMESSA.

values.title: Our values
values.p: The principles that guide how we work—on site, in design, and with partners.

projects.title: Projects
projects.lead: A curated selection of outdoor work—from landscape buildouts to details and special scopes.

p1.p: Full scope of hardscape, softscape, site furniture, and water features.

p2.p: Hardscape, site furniture, cladding, and carved stone bench works.

p3.p: Site furniture, water feature, and cladding—premium outdoor finishing.

p4.p: Landscape + boundary walls, steel fences/gates/shades, timber works, and GRC/GRP/GRG scopes.

p5.p: Full scope of hardscape, softscape, site furniture, and cladding.

p6.p: Hardscape and site furniture package with custom benches and detailing.

p7.p: Split-face textured block boundary wall scope with clean detailing (Misk School Campus).

p8.p: Split-face textured block retaining walls with transitions, corners, and finishes (Misk School Campus).

safety.title: Safety, compliance, and QA/QC
safety.lead: We build with a contractor’s discipline—clear standards, documented checks, and a safety culture that protects teams and outcomes.

standards.p: Work methods aligned to site requirements, approvals, and best-practice controls.

qaqc.p: Structured inspections and punch lists to keep finishing consistent and measurable.

training.p: Toolbox talks, supervision, and incident prevention built into the daily routine.

sustainability.p: Material choices and installation methods that support durability and maintainability.

clients.title: Trusted delivery
clients.lead: We support clients and partners with clear coordination, dependable execution, and premium results.

quality.v: Finishing standards you can see and measure.

schedule.v: Clear planning to protect timelines and handover confidence.

hse.v: Safety culture that protects teams, sites, and outcomes.

clients.hint: Add client/partner logos under assets and we’ll swap these placeholders for a polished logo wall.

contact.title: Let’s build something outdoors
contact.lead: Share a few details and we’ll respond with the next best step.

footer.copy: © Eastern Modern Specialists Artists Company (EMESSA). All rights reserved.

valueStatement: It is our mission to creatively solve our clients’ outdoor landscaping challenges and meet their needs by providing the means to turn their ideas into a beautiful reality.\nWe achieve this mission by building faith in our business through our impeccable reputation—knowing that every job is a reference, no matter how big or small.\nWe aim to build long-term relationships with our clients by caring for their residential or commercial gardens and exceeding expectations year after year.
